allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises Replit as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: Replit is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Replit is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: Replit — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: Both models describe Replit as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: Replit is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: Replit is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

allGaps.description: Both models claim Replit has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

product.name: Replit
product.description: Replit — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: product teams that care about getting recommended

headline.description: ChatGPT categorises Replit as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
headline.chatgptSays: Replit is a project management tool for engineering teams.
headline.claudeSays: Replit is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
headline.siteContent: Replit — the single source of truth for your product team.
